How it works

1

Pick your route

Browse verified drivers already commuting on your route every morning. Filter by time, area and available seats.

2

Book and chat

Reserve a seat and get added to the rider group chat. Coordinate with co-riders before the driver arrives so nobody waits.

3

Ride and rate

Meet at the agreed bus stop, ride comfortably, pay the driver directly. Then rate each other to keep the community safe.

Safety centre

Your safety is our priority

Every driver is verified. Every ride is logged. You are never alone.

Emergency SOS
Tap to alert your emergency contact and Fudur support instantly
Share your trip
Send your live route to a contact

Trusted contacts

NG
Ngozi (Sister)
0802 345 6789 · Will receive trip alerts

Safety tips

🔍
Verify the car before you enter
Always confirm the plate number and car colour match what's shown in the app before getting in.
📱
Use the in-app call feature
Never share your personal phone number. Call and message your driver only through the Fudur app.
👥
Only ride with verified drivers
All Fudur partner drivers have been ID-verified and plate-checked before their first ride.
⭐
Always rate your ride
Ratings keep the community safe. If anything felt wrong, rate honestly — your review matters.

Something go wrong?

Report a driver, incident, or safety concern. Our team reviews every report within 2 hours.
